presentation.valueStatement: A fully integrated creative engine combining strategy, production, talent, and distribution under one roof. From brief to feed, we build ads designed to scale.
presentation.scrollToClick: We turn passive scrolling into intentional action.
presentation.scrollToClickBody: Ads designed to build credibility, spark connection, and convert attention into measurable engagement.
presentation.scrollQuoteAccent: We turn it into global creative impact.

nyx.caption: Performance that converts
nyx.story: We turned a product drop into a narrative moment. The creative leads with tension—a close-up, a pause—before revealing the payoff. Built for scroll-stopping impact and repeat viewability.

amd.caption: Reach that scales
amd.story: Tech that speaks to creators, not just specs. We flipped the script from product-first to lifestyle-first—showing what becomes possible, not just what's inside the box. Audience-first creative that scaled across markets.

pinterest.caption: Quality that elevates
pinterest.story: Discovery-led creative for a discovery platform. We matched intent with inspiration—clean, aspirational visuals that feel native to the feed while driving clear action. Every frame optimized for both brand lift and conversion.

problems.frictionBadge: 6 friction points · 6 ways we fix them
problems.subtitle: Stop struggling with ads. Start scaling them.
problems.subtitleDetail: Every bottleneck you feel—we built The Ad Factory to remove it.

items.tagline: From brief to feed—we own the pipeline.

items.problem: Producing ads takes too much of your time
items.solution: We do it in no time

items.problem: You don't have any content creators
items.solution: We have a network of 4,000+ creators
items.tagline: Curated talent, ready to perform for your brand.

items.solution: We adapt content for every network
items.tagline: One asset, every format. Native to each platform.

items.problem: You need a variety of ads
items.solution: We create ad variety that attracts buyers
items.tagline: Volume + variation. Test more, scale what works.

items.problem: You can't capture the audience's attention
items.solution: We design for attention—hooks that convert
items.tagline: Data-led creative. We know what stops the scroll.

problems.closingTitle: One partner. Full pipeline. No more guesswork.
problems.closingBody: The Ad Factory turns creative chaos into ads that scale.

modusOperandi.sectionTitle: The engine behind The Ad Factory
modusOperandi.subtitle: Three gears that run in sync. Create. Edit. Scale.

steps.title: We create ads
steps.description: Strategy, talent, and production under one roof. From your brief to ad-ready content—we own the creative pipeline from day one.

steps.title: We edit the results
steps.description: Every frame is crafted for impact. We cut, pace, and optimize for the platform—so what you get is ready to perform, not just to ship.

steps.title: We generate AI-powered variations
steps.description: Scale what works. We turn winning creative into multiple angles, formats, and hooks—so you test more and scale faster without starting from zero.

roadmap.subtitle: You approve the brief; we handle the rest. 0% operational headache for your team.

phases.title: Kickoff & Brief
phases.description: We align on goals, messaging, and creative direction.
phases.detail: One kickoff, one brief. You sign off; we move.

phases.title: Talent & Scripts
phases.description: We select the right creators and develop high-converting scripts.
phases.detail: Pre-vetted talent and copy optimized for your KPIs.

phases.title: Production
phases.description: We produce and edit performance-driven content.
phases.detail: In-house production. Every format, every cut.

phases.title: Review & Final Delivery
phases.description: You provide feedback, we refine, and deliver ready-to-run ads in all required formats.
phases.detail: Structured feedback, quick iterations. Then one pack: 9:16, 1:1, 16:9.

roadmap.closingBody: Day 1: your brief. Day 21: ads that perform. One roadmap, no surprises.

letsWorkTogether.thankYouBody: We've received your message and will get back to you with next steps as soon as possible.
letsWorkTogether.serviceLabel: What service or topic would you like to discuss?
letsWorkTogether.subjectLabel: Subject (brief title of your project or idea)
letsWorkTogether.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Campaign inquiry, The Glitch, partnership
letsWorkTogether.messageLabel: Message: tell us what you need (goals, timeline, formats, or any relevant details)
letsWorkTogether.urgencyLabel: How urgent is your need for a response?

urgency.5: We need it as soon as possible

serviceTopics: The Amplifier (Surround audience with consistent proof)

global.intro: Have a vision you'd like to bring to life? Let's talk.
global.body: Whether you need UGC ads, AI-powered content, high-performing hooks, or a full creative pipeline—we're here to help your brand scale. Share your goals, timelines, or a rough idea. We'll match you with the right solution and get back to you with next steps.
global.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your brand and what you're looking for. Campaign goals, preferred formats, timeline—whatever helps us get started.

adFactory.intro: Do you have an idea you'd like to bring to life? Don't waste time and talk to us.
adFactory.body: Whether you need ads that convert, creative that stands out, or a full pipeline from brief to feed—we're here to turn your vision into reality. Share your goals, timelines, or a rough concept. We'll get back to you with next steps.
adFactory.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to bring to life? Campaign goals, formats, timeline—share whatever helps us get started.

glitch.intro: Ready to amplify your brand with AI-generated content? Let's talk about The Glitch.
glitch.body: Whether you need AI avatars for your brand, a 24-asset content pack, or a full 21-day roadmap from kickoff to delivery—we're here to make it happen. Share your campaign goals and timelines. We'll get back to you with next steps.
glitch.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your brand and campaign goals. Interested in The Glitch? Share your timeline and we'll reach out.

hookHunter.intro: Ready for hooks that convert? Let's talk about The Hook Hunter, The Amplifier, or Empire Mode.
hookHunter.body: Whether you want to validate winning hooks with 1 talent (The Hook Hunter), dominate your feed with 3 (The Amplifier), or own your category with 5 (Empire Mode)—we're here to turn your vision into UGC content that performs. Share your goals, timelines, or pack preference. We'll get back to you with next steps.
hookHunter.messagePlaceholder: Which pack interests you—Hunter, Amplifier, or Empire? Share your campaign goals, timeline, and we'll reach out.
